stack: Python MCP server using fastmcp + httpx, GPT-4o-mini for history summarization
tools: get_local_structure, get_github_structure, get_git_history, save/load/delete_memory, set_compression, save/load_history
architecture: Single-file server (server.py ~430 lines), history_hook.py for Claude Code hooks, .mcp_memory.json for key-value context, .mcp_history.json for conversation history
compression: 3-level read-time compression (0=raw, 1=compact, 2=dense) using abbreviation dict + filler removal. Tested 35/35 in tests/test_compression.py
history_system: Hook fires on UserPromptSubmit (every 10 msgs) and PreCompact. Reads transcript, sends to GPT-4o-mini for summary, saves to .mcp_history.json as rolling 20-chunk window
hooks: Configured in .claude/settings.local.json — UserPromptSubmit and PreCompact events trigger history_hook.py
current_work: History hook system complete, needs OPENAI_API_KEY env var and Claude Code restart to activate hooks
key_files: server.py (all MCP tools), history_hook.py (hook script), tests/test_compression.py (35 tests), tests/test_history.py (18 tests)
